markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Brex strategy and refine internal project management.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Brex Strategy:** The strategy is built on 5 topic clusters (3 high-priority) targeting leads, not traffic. Aida is populating the Content OS with net-new ideas, while Nathalie will refresh an underperforming article to create a new, high-quality workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [**Brex Quality Bar:** The client requires a "New York Times finance writer style" and unique insights. The Notion writing guidelines are the source of truth, and a dedicated calibration call will be scheduled with John to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Linear Process:** Linear is being adopted for project management. Nathalie will add a due date property to issues to fix the current default view, which confusingly shows the assignment date instead.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Ramp Strategy:** The Ramp strategy will focus on low-competition, high-volume, long-tail keywords, as the client is less involved and prefers a more hands-off approach.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

## Topics

### Brex Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Generate leads, not traffic volume.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Topic Clusters:** 5 total, based on competitor keyword gap analysis and client input.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**High Priority:** Business Banking & Treasury, Credit Cards & Credit Management, Expense Management.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [**Medium Priority:** Startup Finance & Funding, Industry-Specific Finance.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Content OS:**](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [Aida is populating the OS with net-new content ideas to avoid overlap with Brex's extensive library.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
      - [Ideas are filtered for commercial intent and include a column for secondary keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Google Search Console (GSC) access is needed to identify the best refresh candidates. The current list is a SEMrush-based starting point (URLs ranking 20-50).](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

### Brex Quality & Execution

  - [**Client Expectation:** "New York Times finance writer style" with unique, non-AI-sounding insights.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Source of Truth:** The Notion writing guidelines, updated by Nathalie, capture all client requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [Nathalie will refresh an underperforming article today to create a high-quality example for a new workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [A dedicated 45-min calibration call will be scheduled with John to review the refresh and get specific feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [**Optimization:** Content will be optimized for Gemini AI Overviews by using atomic answers and FAQs interspersed throughout articles.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

### Ramp Strategy

  - [**Approach:** Focus on low-competition, high-volume, long-tail keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The client is less involved and prefers a hands-off process, making this a more efficient strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [**Deliverable:** Nathalie will create a calibration guide for Ramp tomorrow, applying learnings from the Brex refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

### Linear Project Management

  - [**Context:** Linear is being adopted to standardize strategy sprint management.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Current State:** Task assignments are ad hoc, based on a template that predates the current team structure.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Problem:** The default "My Issues" view shows the assignment date, not the due date, causing confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Solution:** Nathalie will add a custom "Due Date" property to all issues.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Request GSC access from Brex.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Send Brex artifacts to John for review before tomorrow's call.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [Schedule the 45-min calibration call with John.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [**Nathalie:**](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [Refresh an underperforming Brex article today to create a new workflow example.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [Create the Ramp calibration guide tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [Add the "Due Date" property to all Linear issues.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [Prepare questions for the Brex segment marketing team meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Complete the Brex Content OS by tomorrow morning.](https://fathom.video/share/tueJMiZgyxehkgiJTLiEnzyd65d5L-Jv?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
